known_limitations: Minimal reproducer of Sentiment read-only reentrancy via Balancer BPT
Citation: https://hackmd.io/@sentimentxyz/SJCySo1z2 — Sentiment official postmortem (Apr 4 2023, ~$1M, Arbitrum)
Vulnerable pattern: Balancer LP price read AFTER token transfer callback — stale during reentrancy
Critical action gated by state: borrow() against inflated Balancer LP price
